instructions.name: assign_permission_to_role
docs: Assign a permission to a role, creating the junction PDA.
Only callable by the super admin.

instructions.name: assign_role_to_user
docs: Assign a role to a user, creating the junction PDA.
Only callable by the super admin.

accounts.name: user
docs: It does not need to sign — only the admin assigns roles.

instructions.name: check_access
docs: Check if a user has a specific permission through any of their roles.
This is a read-only instruction that validates the PDA chain:
user → UserRole → Role → RolePermission → Permission
If any link is missing, the transaction fails (access denied by construction).
Callable by anyone.

accounts.name: user_role
docs: The UserRole junction — proves the user has this role.

accounts.name: role_permission
docs: The RolePermission junction — proves the role has this permission.

instructions.name: create_permission
docs: Create a new named permission (e.g. "read_medical_record").
Only callable by the super admin.

instructions.name: create_role
docs: Create a new named role (e.g. "doctor", "nurse").
Only callable by the super admin.

instructions.name: initialize
docs: Initialize the RBAC system. Creates the singleton state PDA
and sets the caller as the super admin.

instructions.name: remove_permission
docs: Remove a permission by closing its PDA account.
Only callable by the super admin.

instructions.name: remove_role
docs: Remove a role by closing its PDA account.
Only callable by the super admin.

instructions.name: revoke_permission_from_role
docs: Revoke a permission from a role by closing the junction PDA.
Only callable by the super admin.

instructions.name: revoke_role_from_user
docs: Revoke a role from a user by closing the junction PDA.
Only callable by the super admin.

instructions.name: transfer_super_admin
docs: Transfer super admin authority to a new public key.
Only callable by the current super admin.

accounts.name: new_admin
docs: unilaterally transfers ownership.

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Only the super admin can perform this action

errors.name: NameTooLong
errors.msg: Name exceeds the maximum allowed length of 32 characters

errors.name: ResourceTooLong
errors.msg: Resource name exceeds the maximum allowed length of 32 characters

errors.name: ActionTooLong
errors.msg: Action name exceeds the maximum allowed length of 32 characters

errors.name: AccessDenied
errors.msg: Access denied: user does not have the required permission

errors.name: AlreadyInitialized
errors.msg: The RBAC system has already been initialized

types.name: Permission
docs: A named permission in the RBAC system (e.g. "read_medical_record").

fields.name: name
docs: Human-readable permission name.

fields.name: resource
docs: The resource this permission applies to (e.g. "medical_record").

fields.name: action
docs: The action allowed (e.g. "read", "write").

fields.name: created_at
docs: Unix timestamp when this permission was created.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump.

types.name: RbacState
docs: Singleton root state for the RBAC system.
Stores the super-admin authority and aggregate counters.

fields.name: super_admin
docs: The authority who can create/manage roles and permissions.

fields.name: total_roles
docs: Total number of roles created (monotonic counter, never decremented).

fields.name: total_permissions
docs: Total number of permissions created (monotonic counter).

types.name: Role
docs: A named role in the RBAC system (e.g. "doctor", "nurse").

fields.name: name
docs: Human-readable name, max 32 bytes.

fields.name: created_at
docs: Unix timestamp when this role was created.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump.

types.name: RolePermission
docs: Junction account linking a role → permission assignment.

fields.name: role
docs: The role PDA public key.

fields.name: permission
docs: The permission PDA public key.

fields.name: assigned_at
docs: Unix timestamp when this assignment was made.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump.

types.name: UserRole
docs: Junction account linking a user → role assignment.

fields.name: user
docs: The user's public key.

fields.name: role
docs: The role PDA public key.

fields.name: assigned_at
docs: Unix timestamp when this assignment was made.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump.
